name: policy_references_user_metadata_clean
description: RLS policy reading from app_metadata (server-set) should not trigger SC-RLS01
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE tenants (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, tenant_id text)
query_sql:
-- @name CreateTrustJwtPolicy
-- @returns :exec
CREATE POLICY trust_jwt ON tenants USING ((select auth.jwt()) -> 'app_metadata' ->> 'tenant_id' = tenant_id)
